description: Fifth-slice fixture closeout and next queue selection

decision_notes: The fifth-slice Gold Paladin recipe can be used as an offline runtime/test fixture.
The fixture is not a saved player deck and is not automatically visible in UI.
Bot/playbook runtime use still needs a separate gate.

next_queue.title: Fifth Fixture Consumption and Next-Slice Scale Gate
next_queue.goal: Validate how the Gold Paladin fixture can be consumed safely, export reviewable deck text, then decide whether the fixture set is ready for another scale step.

tasks.title: Fifth fixture schema validator
tasks.goal: Validate the Gold Paladin runtime fixture independently from the M53 generator.

tasks.title: Fifth fixture deck text exporter
tasks.goal: Export the Gold Paladin fixture as reviewable count-line deck text without adding it to saved decks.

tasks.title: Fifth fixture headless load smoke
tasks.goal: Load the Gold Paladin fixture through offline/headless paths without UI or bot mutation.

tasks.title: Multi-fixture scale decision
tasks.goal: Review all fixture evidence before selecting any further slice.
